title: Naked and Afraid
description: A recreation of the Naked and Afraid YouTube series in a datapack
body:
A recreation of the [Naked and Afraid YouTube Series](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1hDrQ2ip5YY&t=0s) in a datapack.

Changes:
* Armor will cause you to take damage.
* Totems are used instantly and don't give you any effects.

Watch [this video]([https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I7i8wbGdhIo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I7i8wbGdhIo)) to learn about it.

Please credit me if you use this datapack in any sort of public or profitable manner.
